25:03 ГўВЂВ” February 5, 2025
Update to the Wires Part and ГўВЂВњCreating a Regular WireГўВЂВќ Training Video
We made minor updates to the Wires Part. We also updated the ГўВЂВњCreating a Regular WireГўВЂВќ

Updated the Department of Justice and US Department of the Treasury websites and OFAC contact information.
